family_context.preferred_cover_geography: Georgia and Germany, ideally worldwide excluding the US

method_notes: This artifact records what quote-intake gating was visible at the first public quote, application, comparison, signup, or broker-handoff step reached for each staged candidate.
required_quote_form_fields_observed only lists fields or questions that were explicitly visible in reviewed public sources; it does not infer hidden later fields.

required_contact_details_before_pricing_or_plan_details distinguishes hard-observed contact capture from cases where contact requirements remain unknown because the run did not traverse farther or the quote path was blocked.

required_household_data_before_pricing_or_plan_details records visible family-composition questions such as spouse/dependent toggles, people-to-insure counts, or DOB collection before pricing or plan output.
Where no public quote path was captured, broker pages were used, or anti-bot / technical barriers blocked capture, uncertainty is preserved explicitly rather than guessed away.

records.plan_name: International Health Insurance / Global Medical Cover
eligibility_precheck_details: Policy residence / living country must be selected before continuing.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Where will you be living for the duration of the policy?

evidence.excerpt: Where will you be living for the duration of the policy?*
Please enter where you will be living.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: Quote page says “Get a quote in just 2 minutes” and immediately asks “Where will you be living for the duration of the policy?” on a public country selector page.
The page separately offers “Continue previous quote,” implying quote retrieval may exist later, but the initial quote entry itself is public.
uncertainty_notes: This run did not progress far enough to determine whether later quote retrieval, save-and-return, or purchase steps require account verification.

eligibility_precheck_details: Challenge validation blocks quote contents before any customer fields became visible.

evidence.excerpt: The captured quote URL returned a page titled “Challenge Validation” instead of quote fields.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The captured quote URL returned a page titled “Challenge Validation” instead of quote fields.
The extracted content only exposed challenge/iframe fragments rather than quote details, so the quote path is effectively gated at entry in this run.
uncertainty_notes: The public challenge may be anti-bot rather than a customer login requirement; account-creation or email/phone verification requirements beyond the challenge remain unverified.

records.plan_name: Private Health Insurance & Medical Insurance for Individuals and Families
eligibility_precheck_details: Residence country selection is required before seeing plan availability in region.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Tell us where you'll be living when you want your plan to start.

evidence.excerpt: Tell us where you'll be living when you want your plan to start.
See plans

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The official page publicly exposes a country selector with Georgia and Germany visible and a “See plans” action.
No signup, login, email capture, or phone verification requirement was visible before reaching the country-selection step.
uncertainty_notes: This run did not verify whether later premium output or application steps introduce account or contact-verification requirements.

eligibility_precheck_details: AXA first screens by intended cover length and whether the user wants travel insurance or international healthcare insurance.
Less than 3 months is screened out from this product.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: How long do you need cover for? (<3 months / 3-11 months / 12 months or over)
What type of insurance are you looking for? (Travel Insurance / International Healthcare Insurance)

evidence.excerpt: Less than 3 months / 3-11 months / 12 months or over
Travel Insurance / International Healthcare Insurance

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: AXA’s public quote page asks “What length of cover are you looking for?” and offers online quote links plus callback and phone options.
The first visible decision flow is public and did not require an account before the user could reach quote-routing choices.
uncertainty_notes: The downstream quote.axaglobalhealthcare.com flow was not fully traversed here, so later verification requirements remain unverified.

eligibility_precheck_details: Public entry asks the user to choose cover type, country, and language before deeper quote output.

evidence.excerpt: The page is navigable without signup and lets users choose cover type, country, and language before any observed account gate.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: APRIL states “International health insurance for everyone, 100% online” and presents a public “Find a plan / Get a quote” selector on the landing page.
The page is navigable without signup and lets users choose cover type, country, and language before any observed account gate.
uncertainty_notes: The run did not confirm whether APRIL later requires email verification or account creation before showing final prices or binding coverage.

evidence.excerpt: William Russell says users can “Use the online quote tool” and that prices are shown within minutes.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: William Russell says users can “Use the online quote tool” and that prices are shown within minutes.
The public plan page exposes the quote link and pricing examples without requiring login or registration to read plan details.
uncertainty_notes: The dedicated quote app was referenced but not deeply traversed here, so later account, email, or phone verification remains unverified.

records.plan_name: First'Expat+ / International Health Insurance for Individuals
eligibility_precheck_details: User must confirm location region and select profile type before deeper comparison/offer flow.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Confirm your location (Europe / America / Mena / Asia)
Tell us about yourself. You are ...
An individual / A company / NGO / TPA insurer / Broker / Medical provider

evidence.excerpt: Confirm your location
Tell us about yourself. You are

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: MSH’s page is publicly accessible and starts with “Tell us about yourself. You are” plus profile choices such as individual, company, broker, and NGO.
The page also exposes “Already insured with MSH, I log in,” showing that member login exists, but it is not required for the initial profile-selection step.
uncertainty_notes: This run did not advance through the individual flow, so any later contact capture, account creation, or verification requirements remain unverified.

records.plan_name: SimpleCare / WorldCare International Health Insurance Plans

evidence.excerpt: Now Health’s plan-comparison page is publicly readable and shows product families, benefit tables, and document-library references.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: Now Health’s plan-comparison page is publicly readable and shows product families, benefit tables, and document-library references.
No quote, signup, login wall, or verification requirement was observed before accessing the plan comparison itself.
uncertainty_notes: A distinct public quote-entry path was not verified in this run, so quote-stage friction remains unknown.

evidence.excerpt: Global Medical Gold — Buy Now / See Price; Global Medical Platinum — Buy Now / See Price; Global Medical Silver — Buy Now / See Price.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: IMG publicly shows plan cards with “Buy Now” and “See Price” links for Global Medical plans.
The marketing page exposes those actions and product details without requiring an account at the landing-page stage.
uncertainty_notes: This run did not open the downstream purchase/price pages, so later signup or identity verification requirements remain unverified.

eligibility_precheck_details: No public individual-family quote intake was verified; observed path is oriented around members, brokers, employers, or portal handoff.

evidence.excerpt: The Aetna page is structured around members, brokers, and employers rather than a public individual-family quote form.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The Aetna page is structured around members, brokers, and employers rather than a public individual-family quote form.
For members, the visible action is “Log in to your member website,” and no public direct retail individual quote path was verified on the captured page.
uncertainty_notes: Because this page appears employer/member oriented, it is unclear whether a separate retail individual/family quote flow exists elsewhere or what verification it would require.

records.plan_name: Expat Health Insurance / International Health Insurance comparison

evidence.excerpt: Receive a quote / Get a quick quote / Apply now
Compare our International Health Insurance plans

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: Foyer publicly exposes “Receive a quote,” “Get a quick quote,” and “Apply now” from the plan-comparison page.
Plan details, brochure download, and quote-entry CTAs were all visible before any observed login or account gate.
uncertainty_notes: The quick-quote/application flow itself was not fully traversed here, so later account or verification requirements remain unverified.

evidence.excerpt: We have developed solutions to cover your health costs and your access to quality healthcare abroad.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: Henner’s individuals-and-families page is publicly readable and explains the offering without requiring login.
This run did not capture a distinct quote/application path, so friction at the quote stage could not be observed.
uncertainty_notes: Because no quote flow was verified, signup, account creation, email capture, or phone verification requirements are unknown.

records.plan_name: YouGenio individual international health insurance plans
eligibility_precheck_details: Direct-business-only notice is shown.
User must waive personal consultation or contact support before proceeding.
Applicant nationality, future residency, and signing-country location are part of the entry steps.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Would you like to add another member before calculating the quote?
Country where the application is signed
Consent to waive a personal consultation
required_household_data_before_pricing_o: Whether another member will be added before calculating the quote

evidence.excerpt: Get a quotation in seconds. Get your health insurance in minutes.
Would you like to add another member before calculating the quote?
Please note that this tool is only foreseen for direct business for which there is no involvement of an intermediary.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The application starts publicly with “Get a quotation in seconds. Get your health insurance in minutes.” and shows steps from Quote through Confirmation.
To proceed without consultation, the applicant must tick a waiver: “You need to consent before you can proceed.”
uncertainty_notes: The observed consent requirement is not an account gate, but later identity verification, email confirmation, or portal creation requirements were not verified.

records.plan_name: Evolution Health / Flexible Choices individual international healthcare plans
eligibility_precheck_details: Online quote asks residence, currency, age, nationality, and number of dependents.
If online quote is unavailable for the circumstances, the flow falls back to manual quote request.
required_contact_details_before_pricing_: Phone number optional if requesting a call

evidence.excerpt: Country Of Residence / Currency / Policy Holder Age / Nationality / Dependents
Unfortunately we are unable to quote for your particular circumstances online. Please contact us by email for a quotation

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: Morgan Price says it is “quick and easy to get an instant quote” via the quick-quote form.

The form asks for residence, currency, age, nationality, and dependents; when online quoting cannot proceed it says “Please contact us by email for a quotation,” and the fallback form asks for Email, Name, Age, and Country of Residence with optional phone callback.
uncertainty_notes: The page clearly captures email for manual follow-up in some cases, but this run did not confirm whether email is mandatory for all quote outputs or only fallback scenarios.

evidence.excerpt: PassportCard’s official page publicly shows plan tiers, benefit highlights, and example monthly EUR prices.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: PassportCard’s official page publicly shows plan tiers, benefit highlights, and example monthly EUR prices.
No forced signup, account creation, or login wall was observed before viewing plan details and the benefits PDF link.
uncertainty_notes: A direct quote/application path was not verified in this run, so quote-stage contact or verification friction remains unknown.

records.plan_name: Absolute VIP / Universal VIP / Special VIP / Access VIP product family

evidence.excerpt: VUMI’s homepage publicly lists health plans and regional selection paths without requiring login to read plan positioning.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: VUMI’s homepage publicly lists health plans and regional selection paths without requiring login to read plan positioning.
The same page separately advertises MyVUMI as a “secured platform” for insureds and an agent portal, indicating account-gated servicing exists, but not at the public discovery stage.
uncertainty_notes: A direct public quote path for individuals/families was not verified here, so pre-quote account or verification friction remains unknown.

eligibility_precheck_details: Only broker-led discovery evidence was captured, so insurer intake requirements remain unresolved.

evidence.excerpt: The staged public evidence is a broker page, not an official insurer quote flow.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The staged public evidence is a broker page, not an official insurer quote flow.
The visible quote action is broker-led (“Get a Quote” on InternationalInsurance.com), so direct insurer self-serve quote access was not verified.
uncertainty_notes: The broker’s own quote form friction and any eventual insurer-side account requirements were not fully traced in this run.

records.plan_name: My Global Health individual plans: Blue / Azure / Cobalt / Admiral / Royal

evidence.excerpt: MediHelp’s individual-plans page is publicly accessible and shows both “Get a quote” and “BUY ONLINE.”

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: MediHelp’s individual-plans page is publicly accessible and shows both “Get a quote” and “BUY ONLINE.”
The BUY ONLINE action points to a “#/login” path, indicating a login-gated online-buy route exists, even though public plan details and a quote entry link are visible without login.
uncertainty_notes: This run did not inspect the separate Get a quote form, so any email/phone verification there remains unverified.

records.plan_name: Global Prima Medical Insurance / Flying Colours legacy entrypoints
eligibility_precheck_details: ALC appears to route new business away from the legacy brand, so direct new-business intake requirements were not captured on ALC itself.

evidence.excerpt: Public evidence shows a legacy insurer-branded page, but new-business contact is redirected to IMG rather than retained on the original brand path.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: ALC’s site remains publicly viewable and includes a MyALC claims/member account link.

A notice states: “As of 1 August 2025, new business quotes and sales ... are now handled on our updated website: www.imglobal.com/intl,” so new-business discovery is redirected away from the legacy brand.
uncertainty_notes: This run did not inspect the new IMG-branded destination from the redirect notice for any additional friction.

records.insurer_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield Global Solutions (formerly GeoBlue Xplorer)
records.plan_name: Worldwide Premier / Outside U.S. / Outside U.S. Select
eligibility_precheck_details: Discovery is broker-led, not insurer-led, so direct quote-intake fields were not verified from an official insurer quote flow.

evidence.excerpt: The captured discovery evidence is a broker page summarizing BCBS Global Solutions / former GeoBlue Xplorer.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The captured discovery evidence is a broker page summarizing BCBS Global Solutions / former GeoBlue Xplorer.
Direct insurer self-serve quote access was not verified from the staged evidence, so discovery currently depends on a broker/intermediary path.
uncertainty_notes: Broker form friction and any subsequent insurer verification requirements were not traced in this run.

eligibility_precheck_details: Account creation or login is the first gate before quote contents become visible.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Sign in with Google OR Email + Password to continue

evidence.excerpt: Your global coverage starts here
Email / Password / Continue with email

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The captured entry page is a signup screen headed “Your global coverage starts here.”
Before progressing, the user must either “Sign in with Google” or enter Email and Password to “Continue with email,” and the page also asks “Already have an account? Log in.”
uncertainty_notes: The run did not determine whether any anonymous quote-only path exists elsewhere outside this signup URL.

eligibility_precheck_details: Genki screens for travel duration and excludes trips shorter than one month.
Questionnaire asks whether user is planning travel or already abroad, main destination, home-country healthcare access, and long-term illness preference before recommendation.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Planning to travel or already abroad
How long will you be abroad? (1-12 months / 1 year+)
Do you have access to healthcare in your home country?
What if you get a serious injury or illness and need long-term treatment and recovery?

evidence.excerpt: We don't cover trips shorter than one month.
Answer a few quick questions / Genki finds the right insurance / See the price and sign up in minutes

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: Genki’s consultation starts publicly with “Answer a few quick questions” and says users can “See the price and sign up in minutes.”
The first visible flow collects travel and destination answers without showing a login or account-creation gate at entry.
uncertainty_notes: The wording implies signup later in the process, but this run did not verify whether account creation is required before the final price display or only at purchase.

eligibility_precheck_details: ACS first asks destination country and intended length/stay category.
Coverage need, currency, and beneficiary composition are captured before advisor follow-up.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: I am living abroad... (up to 12 months / Working Holiday Program / more than one year)

evidence.excerpt: Request your free, no-obligation expat health insurance quote
One of our advisors will get back to you promptly with a personalised proposal.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: ACS invites users to “Request your free, no-obligation expat health insurance quote” through a multi-step request flow.

The final step says “Please provide your contact details below. One of our advisors will get back to you promptly with a personalised proposal,” and the form requests name, date of birth, nationality, and contact details.
uncertainty_notes: The extract did not definitively show which contact fields are mandatory beyond the visible personal-data fields, but the quote path clearly shifts to advisor follow-up rather than instant anonymous pricing.

records.plan_name: Health Protect / Protector Plans / Nimbl Health
eligibility_precheck_details: A technical/availability barrier prevented capture of quote questions.

evidence.excerpt: Internet is unstable. Please check your connection.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The captured Outgrow quote URL did not expose quote questions; it returned an “Internet is unstable. Please check your connection” message.
Because the public tool did not render usable quote content in this run, discovery could not verify whether later signup or verification would be required.
uncertainty_notes: The observed failure may be transient or tool-specific rather than a customer-facing hard gate.

records.plan_name: International Health Insurance / Select / Primary+ / Primary+ Lite / Primary
eligibility_precheck_details: Quote requires people-to-insure count, area of cover, and dates of birth before proceeding.
Supports explicit worldwide excluding USA area selection.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Area of Cover (Area 1 / Area 2 worldwide excluding the USA / Area 3 worldwide)
Date of birth for each person
required_contact_details_before_pricing_: Email address to receive a copy of the quotation
required_household_data_before_pricing_o: Date of birth for each insured person

evidence.excerpt: Please enter your email address below to receive a copy of your quotation.
Area 2 - Worldwide excluding the USA.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: The quick-quote form collects people to insure, area of cover, and dates of birth, then says “Please enter your email address below to receive a copy of your quotation.”
Email is part of stage 1 before pressing “PROCEED,” so contact capture occurs before the quote flow advances.
uncertainty_notes: This run did not verify whether the system displays pricing before or only after email submission, but email capture is clearly embedded in the initial quote stage.

eligibility_precheck_details: Step 1 requires coverage start, destination, state, identity, and consent fields before the Plans step.
Family/dependent composition is collected at the basics stage.
required_quote_form_fields_observed: Would you like to combine your CFE Coverage with your WellAway?
Add your spouse/domestic partner to the policy

evidence.excerpt: 1 Basics / 2 Plans / 3 Specifics / 4 Extras / 5 Locations / 6 Health / 7 Payment
Applicant's Email / Origin Phone / Destination Phone / Add your spouse/domestic partner to the policy / number of dependents

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: WellAway Step 1 requires Applicant’s Email, Origin Phone, Destination Phone, nationality, DOB, and other basics before moving on.
The page also states “We keep your information safe! Do you consent with your personal data being processed as described in the Privacy Policy? Click Yes to continue.”

evidence.excerpt: Securus’s page publicly exposes marketing copy and brochure PDFs without requiring login.

supporting_evidence_ledger_entries: Securus’s page publicly exposes marketing copy and brochure PDFs without requiring login.
No forced signup, account gate, or contact-verification requirement was observed before accessing the public benefit materials.
